step_rationale: Angiogenic growth factor; post-MI vascular repair, not atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: VEGF-B promotes vascular growth and endothelial survival during post-MI recovery but is not part of atherothrombotic rupture or thrombosis.

references.title: Multiplex quantitative imaging of human myocardial infarction by mass spectrometry-immunohistochemistry.
